name: River Forest Country Club
about: River Forest Country Club is a semi-private golf facility located in Freeport, PA, approximately 30 minutes from Pittsburgh. The venue operates on 450 wooded acres and features a well-maintained golf course, an elegant venue for weddings and banquets, and various dining options. It offers activities including golf leagues, outings, and a dedicated golf simulator experience. The club prides itself on providing accessible golf opportunities for players of all skill levels through flexible membership options and varied pricing models.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive golf simulator technology with a 10% member discount
Semi-private course offering both challenging play and accessible pricing
Diverse amenities including pro shop, dining, and event hosting capabilities
Flexible membership options tailored to different skill levels and budgets
Convenient booking system for tee times and simulator rentals

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available at The Grill with online ordering options
Full bar service available at The Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as simulator option with 10% member discount

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or rental clubs are typically available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site dining and bar service at The Grill, though outside food policies aren't explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole simulator session typically takes approximately 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family-friendly activities including youth golf options, bike rentals, and event hosting suitable for various ages.
